productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Men White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case Dial style: White dial with white hands Strap style: Brown textured genuine leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 3 hour mark and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
